fields.Headline: Virtual Drive Test & Hardware-in-the-Loop
fields.Headline-em: Bring the Field Reliably Back to the Lab
fields.Sub: Driven by high-fidelity channels and coverage generated by Lauraycs ray tracing, control channel emulators, signal generators, vector signal analyzers and OTA anechoic chambers to run repeatable, regressible hardware-in-the-loop testing on real terminals, modules and automotive-grade devices. Let "that one field signal issue that was impossible to reproduce" be reliably replayed, tuned and regressed in the lab.

items.title: Headline
items.text: Virtual Drive Test & Hardware-in-the-Loop

items.title: Headline-em
items.text: Bring the Field Reliably Back to the Lab

items.title: Sub
items.text: Driven by high-fidelity channels and coverage generated by Lauraycs ray tracing, control channel emulators, signal generators, vector signal analyzers and OTA anechoic chambers to run repeatable, regressible hardware-in-the-loop testing on real terminals, modules and automotive-grade devices. Let "that one field signal issue that was impossible to reproduce" be reliably replayed, tuned and regressed in the lab.

table.Label: Field scenarios replayed in the lab
Compatible with Keysight / R&S / Spirent / domestic instruments

fields.Title: The Predicament of Physical Drive Testing and the Complexity of New Scenarios
fields.Description: R&D and certification of 5G/6G, V2X, low-altitude and satellite NTN terminals increasingly rely on end-to-end testing "in a real electromagnetic environment." Yet physical drive testing is breaking down across multiple dimensions at once.

table.Title: Not repeatable
table.Text: Weather, traffic and tidal pedestrian flows mean two runs of the same route produce data that cannot be aligned; bugs are hard to reproduce and regression is impossible.

table.Title: Missing extreme scenarios
table.Text: Tunnels, interchanges, air-ground integration, satellite-to-ground handover and mmWave blockage—these critical scenarios are either unavailable or unsafe to encounter in the field.

table.Title: Cost and cycle time
table.Text: A single automotive-grade drive test routinely runs into millions and takes months; 6G/NTN/low-altitude scenarios may even lack a usable real-world road network.

fields.Title: Simulated Channels Drive Real Instruments, Hardware-in-the-Loop Reproduces the Real World
fields.Description: The deterministic multipath channels and coverage sequences output by Lauraycs serve as the input to channel emulators / OTA anechoic chambers; the DUT (terminal, module, in-vehicle T-Box, satellite terminal) "sees" in the lab an electromagnetic environment identical to the field. We offer three deployment forms covering different testing needs, from rapid scenario generation to fully closed-loop HIL.

table.Title: Scenario generation
table.Text: Based on 3D maps, trajectories and antennas, generate time-varying CIR/PDP and output to the standard formats of mainstream channel emulators (CMX/SCT/SLN).

table.Title: Hardware-in-the-loop (HIL)
table.Text: Simulated channels are replayed in real time into the channel emulator; power, demodulation and protocol metrics measured at the DUT reproduce the field 1:1.

table.Title: OTA anechoic chamber co-test
table.Text: Multi-probe OTA systems (typically 16/32 probes) drive directional, beamforming and multipath performance validation of MIMO/Massive MIMO terminals.

fields.Title: From Map to DUT, an End-to-End Repeatable Test Chain
fields.Description: The overall chain comprises four stages: scenario and map, ray-tracing channel generation, real-time channel emulator / OTA drive, and DUT measurement and regression. Every stage provides APIs and scripting capabilities for easy embedding into the customer's existing automated test platform.

table.Title: Scenario & trajectory modeling
table.Desc: Import road-network/indoor/low-altitude/satellite-ground 3D models; define BS/satellite/vehicle/UAV trajectories and antenna patterns.

table.Title: High-fidelity channel generation
table.Desc: Lauraycs outputs time-varying CIR, PDP, Doppler and AoA/AoD/ZoA/ZoD clusters.

table.Title: Channel format conversion
table.Desc: Automatically convert to formats supported by channel emulators / OTA tools (e.g., PROPSIM, F8800, Vertex, Anritsu MD8475).

table.Title: HIL drive & measurement
table.Desc: Drive instruments in real time; the DUT is connected via interface/chamber; automatically collect KPIs and regress.

table.Spec: Keysight PROPSIM / F8800, R&S CMW/CMX, Spirent Vertex/8100, Anritsu MD8475, domestic channel emulators (multiple vendors)
600 MHz – 100 GHz (incl. FR1/FR2/FR3); dedicated support for sub-THz 6G HIL
L3-level time-sequence replay, time resolution ≤ 1 ms; joint multi-Tx/Rx trajectories
CMX/F8800 SCT, PROPSIM PSCN, Vertex SCS, CDL/TDL JSON, custom
Python API, command-line batch, SCPI, integration with NI TestStand / automation platforms
4G/5G NSA & SA, NTN (NB-IoT NTN / NR NTN), V2X (PC5 / Uu), Wi-Fi 7, LoRa
Demodulation throughput, BLER, TPUT, TTFF, handover success rate, beam-tracking error, etc.
Lab single-node / multi-node collaboration / self-controllable cluster; supports Remote Lab

fields.End-to-end closed loop from scenario to: A domestically unique "3D map → RT channel → channel emulator → DUT" end-to-end workflow that avoids manual stitching.
fields.Instrument-agnostic: One scenario can simultaneously output the formats required by mainstream international vendors and domestic channel emulators, avoiding vendor lock-in.
fields.Regressible: Any signal issue arising in the field can be converted into a repeatable script and added to the regression test library.
fields.Extreme scenarios generated on demand: "High-difficulty" scenarios such as hidden blind spots under overpasses, tunnel handover, satellite shadowing and low-altitude tower clusters are generated on demand.
fields.Self-controllable and cross-platform: A complete toolchain supports Linux / Kylin and, together with domestic instrument vendors, can form a "fully domestic" virtual drive test solution.
fields.Dynamic time-varying HIL: L3-level time-sequence simulation feeds directly into real-time replay, avoiding pseudo-HIL that only replays "static slices."

items.title: End-to-end closed loop from scenario to DUT
items.text: A domestically unique "3D map → RT channel → channel emulator → DUT" end-to-end workflow that avoids manual stitching.

items.title: Instrument-agnostic
items.text: One scenario can simultaneously output the formats required by mainstream international vendors and domestic channel emulators, avoiding vendor lock-in.

items.title: Regressible
items.text: Any signal issue arising in the field can be converted into a repeatable script and added to the regression test library.

items.title: Extreme scenarios generated on demand
items.text: "High-difficulty" scenarios such as hidden blind spots under overpasses, tunnel handover, satellite shadowing and low-altitude tower clusters are generated on demand.

items.title: Self-controllable and cross-platform
items.text: A complete toolchain supports Linux / Kylin and, together with domestic instrument vendors, can form a "fully domestic" virtual drive test solution.

items.title: Dynamic time-varying HIL
items.text: L3-level time-sequence simulation feeds directly into real-time replay, avoiding pseudo-HIL that only replays "static slices."

table.Title: In-vehicle T-Box / OBU
table.Text: Reproduce urban/tunnel/campus V2X and cellular dual links in the lab to validate handover, positioning and remote driving.

table.Title: 5G/6G terminal certification
table.Text: Replay real PDP in the OTA chamber to run regression tests on terminal MIMO demodulation and beam tracking.

table.Title: NTN terminals
table.Text: Real satellite trajectories + urban ground shadowing to validate the connection stability of NB-IoT NTN / NR NTN terminals.

table.Title: UAV / low-altitude
table.Text: Reproduce low-altitude C2 link-loss risk scenarios to regress flight-control communication redundancy design.

table.Title: Industrial terminals
table.Text: Regress 5G LAN / Wi-Fi 7 module performance under production-line interference and metal-reflection scenarios.

table.Title: Protocol research
table.Text: Convert "field anomaly packets" into repeatable channels to pinpoint protocol-stack/algorithm bugs.

table.Label: Mainstream channel emulator / OTA models already integrated
Reduction in manual stitching hours for drive-test scenarios (measured at typical customers)
Dual-track compatibility, avoiding supply-chain single points

fields.Headline: 虚拟路测与硬件在环
fields.Headline-em: 把外场稳定带回实验室
fields.Sub: 在 Lauraycs 射线跟踪生成的高保真信道与覆盖驱动下，控制信道仿真仪、信号源、向量信号分析仪与 OTA 暗室，对真实终端、模组与车规设备进行可重复、可回归的硬件在环测试。让"那一次外场难以复现的信号问题"，在实验室里能稳定重放、调参与回归。

items.title: Badge
items.text: Datasheet · L2 / Virtual Drive Test & HIL

items.title: Eyebrow
items.text: 产品策略三层结构 · 第二层

items.title: Headline
items.text: 虚拟路测与硬件在环

items.title: Headline-em
items.text: 把外场稳定带回实验室

items.title: Sub
items.text: 在 Lauraycs 射线跟踪生成的高保真信道与覆盖驱动下，控制信道仿真仪、信号源、向量信号分析仪与 OTA 暗室，对真实终端、模组与车规设备进行可重复、可回归的硬件在环测试。让"那一次外场难以复现的信号问题"，在实验室里能稳定重放、调参与回归。

table.Label: 多端口 OTA / 信道仿真仪联调
兼容 Keysight / R&S / Spirent / 国产仪器

fields.Title: 物理路测的困境与新场景的复杂度
fields.Description: 5G/6G、V2X、低空、卫星 NTN 终端的研发与认证，越来越依赖"在真实电磁环境下"的端到端测试。但物理路测正在多个维度同时失灵。

table.Title: 不可重复
table.Text: 天气、车流、潮汐式人流让同一段路两次跑出来的数据无法对齐，bug 难复现，回归无法做。

table.Title: 极端场景缺失
table.Text: 隧道、立交、空地一体、星地切换、毫米波遮挡这些关键场景，外场要么不可遇要么不安全。

table.Title: 成本与周期
table.Text: 一次车规级路测动辄百万级费用、数月周期；6G/NTN/低空场景甚至缺乏可用的真实路网。

fields.Title: 仿真信道驱动真实仪器，硬件在环复现真实世界
fields.Description: Lauraycs 输出的确定性多径信道与覆盖序列，作为信道仿真仪/OTA 暗室的输入；DUT（终端、模组、车载 T-Box、卫星终端）在实验室中"看到"和外场完全一致的电磁环境。我们提供三种部署形态，覆盖从快速场景生成到全闭环 HIL 的不同测试需求。

table.Title: 场景生成
table.Text: 基于 3D 地图、轨迹与天线，生成时变 CIR/PDP，输出至主流信道仿真仪标准格式（CMX/SCT/SLN）。

table.Title: 硬件在环 (HIL)
table.Text: 仿真信道实时回放进入信道仿真仪；DUT 端测得的功率、解调、协议指标 1:1 还原外场。

table.Title: OTA 暗室联调
table.Text: 多探头 OTA 系统（典型 16/32 探头），驱动 MIMO/Massive MIMO 终端的方向性、波束化与多径性能验证。

fields.Title: 从地图到 DUT，端到端可重复的测试链路
fields.Description: 整体链路分为四个阶段：场景与地图、射线跟踪信道生成、信道仿真仪/OTA 实时驱动、DUT 测量与回归。每一个环节均提供 API 与脚本化能力，便于嵌入客户现有的自动化测试平台。

table.Title: 场景 & 轨迹建模
table.Desc: 导入路网/室内/低空/星地 3D 模型，定义 BS/卫星/车辆/UAV 轨迹与天线方向图。

table.Title: 高保真信道生成
table.Desc: Lauraycs 输出时变 CIR、PDP、Doppler、AoA/AoD/ZoA/ZoD 簇。

table.Title: 信道格式转换
table.Desc: 自动转换为信道仿真仪/OTA 工具支持格式（如 PROPSIM、F8800、Vertex、Anritsu MD8475 等）。

table.Title: HIL 驱动 & 测量
table.Desc: 实时驱动仪器，DUT 经接口/暗室连接被测；自动采集 KPI 并回归。

table.规格: Keysight PROPSIM / F8800、R&S CMW/CMX、Spirent Vertex/8100、Anritsu MD8475、国产信道仿真仪（多家）
600 MHz – 100 GHz（含 FR1/FR2/FR3）；专项支持 sub-THz 6G HIL
L3 级时序回放，时间分辨率 ≤ 1 ms；多 Tx/Rx 联合轨迹
CMX/F8800 SCT、PROPSIM PSCN、Vertex SCS、CDL/TDL JSON、自定义
Python API、命令行批处理、SCPI、与 NI TestStand / 自动化平台集成
4G/5G NSA & SA、NTN（NB-IoT NTN / NR NTN）、V2X (PC5 / Uu)、Wi-Fi 7、LoRa
解调吞吐、BLER、TPUT、TTFF、切换成功率、波束跟踪误差等
实验室单机 / 多机协同 / 国产化集群；支持远程实验室 (Remote Lab)

fields.场景到 DUT 全闭环: 国内独有的"3D 地图 → RT 信道 → 信道仿真仪 → DUT"端到端工作流，避免人工拼接。
fields.仪器无关: 一份场景可同时输出主流国际厂家与国产信道仿真仪所需格式，避免厂商锁定。
fields.可回归: 任何外场出现的信号问题，可被转换为可重复脚本，纳入回归测试库。
fields.极端场景按需生成: 立交桥隐性盲区、隧道切换、卫星阴影、低空塔林等"高难度"场景按需生成。
fields.国产化与跨平台: 完整工具链支持 Linux / 麒麟，配合国产仪器厂商可形成"全国产"虚拟路测方案。
fields.动态时变 HIL: L3 级时序级仿真直接进入实时回放，避免只回放"静态切片"的伪 HIL。

items.title: 场景到 DUT 全闭环
items.text: 国内独有的"3D 地图 → RT 信道 → 信道仿真仪 → DUT"端到端工作流，避免人工拼接。

items.title: 仪器无关
items.text: 一份场景可同时输出主流国际厂家与国产信道仿真仪所需格式，避免厂商锁定。

items.title: 可回归
items.text: 任何外场出现的信号问题，可被转换为可重复脚本，纳入回归测试库。

items.title: 极端场景按需生成
items.text: 立交桥隐性盲区、隧道切换、卫星阴影、低空塔林等"高难度"场景按需生成。

items.title: 国产化与跨平台
items.text: 完整工具链支持 Linux / 麒麟，配合国产仪器厂商可形成"全国产"虚拟路测方案。

items.title: 动态时变 HIL
items.text: L3 级时序级仿真直接进入实时回放，避免只回放"静态切片"的伪 HIL。

table.Title: 车载 T-Box / OBU
table.Text: 在实验室复现城市/隧道/园区 V2X 与蜂窝双链路，验证切换、定位与远程驾驶。

table.Title: 5G/6G 终端认证
table.Text: 在 OTA 暗室回放真实 PDP，对终端 MIMO 解调、波束跟踪进行回归测试。

table.Title: NTN 终端
table.Text: 真实卫星轨迹 + 城市地面阴影，验证 NB-IoT NTN / NR NTN 终端连接稳定性。

table.Title: UAV / 低空
table.Text: 复现低空 C2 链路丢失风险场景，回归飞控通信冗余设计。

table.Title: 工业终端
table.Text: 在产线干扰、金属反射场景下回归 5G LAN / Wi-Fi 7 模组性能。

table.Title: 协议研究
table.Text: 把"外场异常包"转换为可重复信道，定位协议栈/算法 bug。

table.Label: 信道仿真仪 / OTA 主流型号已对接
路测场景人工拼接工时下降（典型客户实测）
双轨兼容，避免供应链单点
